channel.title: GitHub Dart Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Dart in GitHub

item.title: ReVanced/revanced-manager
item.description: 💊 Application to use ReVanced on Android

item.title: flutter/flutter
item.description: Flutter makes it easy and fast to build beautiful apps for mobile and beyond

item.title: KaringX/karing
item.description: Simple & Powerful proxy utility, Support routing rules for clash/sing-box

item.title: kodjodevf/mangayomi
item.description: Free and open source application that allows users to read manga and stream anime from a variety of sources including BitTorrent available on Android, iOS, macOS, Linux and Windows

item.title: jiangtian616/JHenTai
item.description: A cross-platform manga app made for e-hentai & exhentai by Flutter

item.title: DJDoubleD/refreezer
item.description: An alternative Deezer music streaming & downloading client, based on Freezer.

item.title: wgh136/PicaComic
item.description: A comic app built with Flutter, supporting multiple comic sources.

item.title: ImranR98/Obtainium
item.description: Get Android app updates straight from the source.

item.title: Predidit/Kazumi
item.description: 基于自定义规则的番剧采集APP，支持流媒体在线观看，支持弹幕。

item.title: miru-project/miru-app
item.description: 🎉 A versatile application that is free, open-source, and supports extension sources for videos, comics, and novels, available on Android, Windows, and Web platforms.

item.title: dstark5/Openlib
item.description: An Open source app to download and read books from shadow library (Anna’s Archive)

item.title: jameskokoska/Cashew
item.description: 💸 An app created to help users manage a budget and purchases

item.title: niuhuan/jasmine
item.description: A comic browser，support Android / iOS / MacOS / Windows / Linux.

item.title: chen08209/FlClash
item.description: A multi-platform proxy client based on ClashMeta,simple and easy to use, open-source and ad-free.

item.title: KRTirtho/spotube
item.description: 🎧 Open source Spotify client that doesn't require Premium nor uses Electron! Available for both desktop & mobile!

item.title: guozhigq/pilipala
item.description: PiliPala 是使用Flutter开发的BiliBili第三方客户端，感谢使用。
